title: ETH/USDT0
riskDescription: This strategy is moderate risk, due to its strategy optimization and the price deviations between the non-correlated assets. Impermanent loss can occur based on price deviations.

title: USDC/DAI
riskDescription: This strategy is low risk. The assets are highly correlated in price. Please note input proportions vs output proportions may vary.
strategyInfoOverride: This strategy is designed for correlated pairs and centers liquidity around a defined peg. It uses median observation over multiple snapshots to avoid reacting to short-term volatility and performs controlled swaps within a single tick to minimize slippage. As a result it does not aim to maintain a specific ratio of the assets in the pool.
